scope: targeted isolated probes; not a full repository test run

results.title: tick 写入异常后锁清理
results.expected: 异常后锁必须在 finally 中释放

results.title: 未来 heartbeat 时间戳
results.expected: 负值或明确 clock_skew 错误

results.title: 恢复清单路径穿越
results.expected: 拒绝包含 ../ 或逃逸备份根目录的路径

results.title: 恢复失败对现有数据库的破坏
results.expected: 临时文件验证通过后原子替换；失败时保留原库

results.title: 备份同名辅助文件冲突
results.expected: 每个来源路径必须映射到唯一、安全、可追踪的备份路径

results.title: 调度模板路径转义

observed.snippet:
[Service]
Type=oneshot
WorkingDirectory=/tmp/Project With Space;echo injected
ExecStart=/usr/bin/env PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m arxiv_daily_push tick --state-dir /tmp/state dir --generated-at "$ADP_GENERATED_AT" --json

[Timer]
OnBootSec=5min
OnUnitActiveSec=30min
Persistent=true

results.expected: 结构化参数或严格 shell escaping

results.title: macOS launchd plist 可解析性

observed.parse_error: ExpatError: not well-formed (invalid token): line 7, column 103
observed.snippet:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0"><dict>
<key>Label</key><string>com.linze.adp.stage1.tick</string>
<key>Disabled</key><true/>
<key>StartInterval</key><integer>1800</integer>
<key>ProgramArguments</key><array><string>/bin/sh</string><string>-lc</string><string>cd /tmp/project && PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m arxiv_daily_push tick --state-dir /tmp/state --g

results.expected: plistlib 可解析的合法 XML plist

results.title: 64 并发 tick 单实例探针
results.expected: 同一瞬间仅一个成功，其他明确阻塞且最终无残锁

results.title: 状态历史 from_state 防篡改
results.expected: 识别 from_state 与前一 to_state 不一致

results.title: current_state 与历史末态一致性
results.expected: 识别 current_state 与 state_history 末态不一致

results.title: SMTP delivery_id 内容敏感性
results.expected: 内容修订应有 revision/content hash，同时保持明确幂等键

results.title: 标准 Message-ID 头
results.expected: 提供稳定标准 Message-ID 并绑定 outbox 记录

results.title: lesson_id 对 claim 内容/证据版本敏感
results.expected: Claim 内容或证据版本变化时生成可追踪的新 revision

results.title: frontstage 推断的证据绑定
results.expected: 一行结论、机制链、映射、行动均含 claim/evidence 或明确标注 inference

results.title: artifact_files.sha256 语义
results.expected: 字段 sha256 必须是文件字节标准 SHA-256

results.title: 先写文件后质量验证
results.expected: 质量验证通过后才原子发布；失败不得留下正式产物

results.title: 邮件链接 scheme 白名单
results.expected: 仅允许 https/http 且可选来源域白名单

results.title: SQLite 120 项/24 并发写入探针
results.expected: 无 database locked、数据数量守恒
